blocks.text: looked at Marcus first. He'd been watching him all weekend. Something had been wrong before any of this.
looked at the glass first. Positioned correctly. Not moved. Someone who drank from it went to sleep and didn't wake up.
looked at the door first. The latch was thrown from the inside. Nobody else was here. Except someone was.
took it all in at once.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: The door was locked from the inside.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: Nobody touched it. It's sitting exactly where someone placed it. Not where someone set it down in a hurry.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: We need to wait for the police.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: Promise me you will wait for the police.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: And then you will tell them exactly what you saw and let them handle it.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: Say it like you mean it.

blocks.prompt: Julian promised. Will he keep it?

options.label: He'll wait. But waiting isn't the same as stopping.
